user_question: Quelles communes ont vu leurs dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) augmenter de plus de 15% entre 2023 et 2024 ?
gold_sql: WITH depenses_2023 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS df01 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2023'), depenses_2024 AS (SELECT d.siret, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS df01 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT d.city_name, ((d2024.df01 - d2023.df01) / d2023.df01) * 100 AS evolution_pourcentage FROM documents d JOIN depenses_2023 d2023 ON d.siret = d2023.siret JOIN depenses_2024 d2024 ON d.siret = d2024.siret WHERE ((d2024.df01 - d2023.df01) / d2023.df01) > 0.15;
generated_sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CASE WHEN er.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_2023,
       SUM(CASE WHEN er.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_2024,
       ((SUM(CASE WHEN er.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) -
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END)) /
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN er.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END),0)) * 100.0 AS pct_change
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF01'
GROUP BY d.city_name
HAVING pct_change > 15

user_question: Communes dont le ratio dette/recettes (D001/RF01) dépasse 1.5 en 2024.
gold_sql: SELECT d.city_name FROM (SELECT d.document_id, MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS dette, MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS recettes FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','RF01') GROUP BY d.document_id) AS sub JOIN documents d ON sub.document_id = d.document_id WHERE sub.dette / sub.recettes > 1.5 GROUP BY d.city_name;
generated_sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END),0) AS ratio_d001_rf01
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.city_name
HAVING ratio_d001_rf01 > 1.5
